payload.title: Define User Site as user-locus Site awareness and coordination registry
payload.summary: Operator and architect clarified that a top-level Narada architect working in the User Site should know about all Narada Sites relevant to the user profile. The User Site should serve as the user-locus awareness directory and coordination surface for project, client, data, ELT, PC, and Narada proper Sites, while not automatically claiming mutation authority over those Sites.
evidence: Current C:\Users\Andrey\Narada\config.json already contains manual linked_sites for Narada source clones, narada.sonar, thoughts, thoughts .narada, Staccato client service, Staccato data, and Staccato ELT side.
Current User Site config also has pc_locus pointing to C:\ProgramData\Narada\sites\pc\desktop-sunroom-2.
This partially implements the stance but only as a manual linked-sites map, not as a governed awareness registry/discovery/subscription surface.
Plural Embodiment, Singular Authority requires awareness to remain distinct from mutation authority.
Site pub/sub proposal suggests Sites should exchange typed signals while preserving governed local admission.
proposal: Define the User Site as the operator-level Site directory and coordination locus for the user's Narada world.

Add first-class User Site awareness registry semantics for Sites relevant to the user: project Sites, client/service Sites, data Sites, ELT Sites, PC Sites, Narada proper clones/embodiments, and message/intake routes.

For each known Site, record identity, roots, locus type, authority boundaries, sync posture, readable/proposable/forwardable/mutable capabilities, inbox endpoint, subscription topics, lineage/provenance, and freshness/health posture.
User Site awareness should enable discovery, status, routing, proposal submission, subscription management, and cross-locus navigation, but not imply authority to mutate another Site.
narada sites/list/doctor or a User Site specific command should surface this registry and distinguish linked, discovered, subscribed, stale, missing, and authority-bearing Sites.
Integrate this with future Site lifecycle, pub/sub, and provenance lineage machinery so the User Site can remain aware of cloned/split/absorbed/re-instantiated Sites without becoming their owner.
payload.recommendation: Promote to Narada product/design task adjacent to Site lifecycle and pub/sub: make User Site the user-locus awareness registry and coordination surface, with awareness explicitly separated from authority.

promotion.note: Envelope archived; no target-zone mutation was performed.
